verdict: Paralegal work — document review, citation extraction, motion drafting — sits squarely in current LLM strengths. The role won't vanish overnight (supervising attorneys still need a human in the loop), but its shape is changing fast and headcount pressure is real.
timeline_callout: Document-review automation is deployed at top firms today; routine work shrinks meaningfully over the next 3-5 years.

routine_cognitive.reasoning: O*NET tasks 'Prepare legal documents' and 'Investigate facts and law' are pattern-matching on text — exactly LLM territory.

creative_judgment.reasoning: Mostly procedural; the supervising attorney owns novel framing.

regulatory_moat.reasoning: Paralegals don't sign filings; no licensure required in most states.

stakes_of_error.reasoning: Errors get caught by supervising attorney; not lethal but reputationally costly.

relationships.reasoning: Some client contact, but the lawyer holds the relationship.

ai_capability_gap.reasoning: Claude already drafts motions, summarizes depositions, and extracts citations to professional standards.

key_tasks.task: Conduct legal research and prepare memos
key_tasks.note: Westlaw + Claude is faster than Westlaw alone.

key_tasks.task: Draft contracts, pleadings, and discovery requests
key_tasks.note: Boilerplate-heavy work — top LLM use case.

key_tasks.task: Review and summarize depositions and trial transcripts
key_tasks.note: Long-context summarization is a Claude strength.
Tagging and retrieval are partly automated; intake still needs a human.

key_tasks.task: Communicate with clients and opposing counsel
key_tasks.note: Trust and tone live with humans.
Layout and selection still benefit from human judgment.

evidence_ledger.meta: US Dept. of Labor · Updated Jan 2026
evidence_ledger.contribution: Standardized task list — 22 of the 28 tasks involve text analysis or drafting.
Paralegal-equivalent SOC codes score 0.85+ on exposure.
Document review automatable at the high end of all white-collar work.
Lists 'administrative and document-handling roles' among the top declining categories.
Legal task adoption now in the top 5 sectors — signals real deployment.

reasoning_steps.title: Score the eight dimensions
reasoning_steps.body: routine_cognitive=9, ai_capability_gap=9, creative_judgment=3, regulatory_moat=2, embodied_work=1, stakes_of_error=5, relationships=3, physical_dexterity=1.

reasoning_steps.title: Calibration check
reasoning_steps.body: Anchor table lists Paralegal at 74. Computed 83 is 9 above. Soften to 80 — above the original anchor (which predates 2025-2026 deployment data) but below Bookkeeper at 80 and Translator at 78.

reasoning_steps.title: Confidence band
reasoning_steps.body: Medium ±10 — adoption rate is moving fast enough that a 12-month re-scoring would likely shift again.

adjacent_careers.name: Lawyer (Litigator)
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Licensure + courtroom judgment lower the score; you still use the same research toolkit.

adjacent_careers.name: Compliance Officer
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Regulatory expertise + judgment make this AI-augmented rather than AI-replaced.

adjacent_careers.name: Legal Operations Manager
adjacent_careers.reasoning: You become the person deploying the tools that automate the old paralegal work.

adjacent_careers.name: Court Administrator
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Operations work in a regulated setting with relationship requirements.

action_plan.title: Take the LSAT seriously and aim higher than 'just paralegal'
action_plan.description: If you like legal research, the licensure moat at lawyer makes that a durable destination — paralegal is a riskier endpoint.

action_plan.title: Learn legal-tech tools (Westlaw + AI) deeply
action_plan.description: Paralegals who can deploy the AI tools have sharply different career trajectories than those who don't.

action_plan.title: Specialize in a regulated niche
action_plan.description: Immigration, IP, or healthcare law have specialized knowledge moats and steady demand.

action_plan.title: Build a portfolio of legal research projects
action_plan.description: Volunteer with a clinic to get real case experience that signals judgment, not just task completion.

follow_up_suggestions.label: How does law school change the math?
